name: Shashank Umashankar
bio: Founder of 14U Capital. Leads investor relations, deal strategy, and firm direction — with a relentless focus on helping founders navigate the earliest and most critical stages of their journey.

name: Depesh Vyas
bio: Oversees operations, execution, and internal strategy. Focused on scaling portfolio companies with hands-on operational support and a sharp eye for growth inflection points.
